title: Young & Dangerous: The Prequel
original_title: 新古惑仔之少年激鬥篇
overview: Showcasing the earlier years of Chan Ho Nam and Chicken, this prequel tells of their time during their willingness to follow Hung Hing's Uncle Bee.
